items.name: AuctionsPlatform
items.description: AuctionHub is a browsing-only car auction intelligence platform. It pulls vehicle listings from multiple auction sources, normalizes them into one feed, deduplicates vehicles, scores risk and deal quality, estimates total cost, and sends users back to the original auction site to bid.
